name: Barbecued Vietnamese Five-Spice Cornish Game Hens
recipeIngredient: 2 Shallots, or 3 green onions, white part only
recipeInstructions:
1. This aromatic barbecued game hen can be easily served Western style with rice, cole slaw or a green salad.
2. Halve the hens through the breast.
3. Flatten the hens with the palm of your hand.
4. In a mortar or food processor, pound or mince garlic, shallots and sugar until combined.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly to coat the hens evenly.
6. Place the marinated hens skin-side down on the grill.
7. Grill over medium coals for 15 minutes.
8. Turn the hens and continue grilling for another 15 minutes, or until they reach a safe internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
9. Serve with Nuoc Cham dipping sauce.
